INTC.rationale: Intel's deteriorating fundamentals—negative Q1 EPS and near-zero operating margin—combined with a still-elevated P/E of 32.8x and no meaningful AI narrative make the risk-reward unattractive over the next year.

Operating margin collapsed to 0.9% and ROE at 3.6%, indicating deep operational distress
P/E of 32.8x remains high relative to near-zero earnings power, offering no margin of safety
Stock down 30.4% over 3 months with no positive catalysts in recent news flow; AI narrative dominated by NVDA and AMD, not INTC
